GrabScript ← Back to app

Cookie Policy

Last updated: May 14, 2026

The Short Version

GrabScript does not use cookies. That's it. No cookie banner, no consent pop-up, no tracking.

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files that websites store on your browser. They're commonly used for tracking, analytics, advertising, and remembering user preferences.

Why We Don't Use Them

GrabScript doesn't require user accounts, doesn't serve ads, and doesn't use analytics tools like Google Analytics. Since we don't need to remember anything about you, we have no reason to use cookies.

Third-Party Cookies

We load fonts from Google Fonts and the Tailwind CSS framework from a CDN. These services may set their own cookies according to their respective privacy policies. We have no control over third-party cookies.

Local Storage

GrabScript does not use browser local storage or session storage to store any data.

Changes

If we ever introduce cookies in the future (for example, for optional user preferences), we will update this page and provide a clear consent mechanism.

Questions?

Reach out via our contact page.
